parts.text: Hi, I have a wheat field at latitude 19.5 and longitude 75.3, field size is 2.5ha, planted on 2026-05-10.

Based on the recent weather and rainfall, your irrigation needs are minimal this week. You only need to irrigate on June 27th with approximately 119,163 liters and June 28th with about 8,838 liters. By following this precise schedule instead of a traditional approach, you are effectively saving 922,000 liters of water, representing an 87.8% reduction in water usage.

Advisory: This recommendation supplements, does not replace, local agricultural extension advice.
